company.name: Digixr Technologies
company.tagline: Empowering Businesses with AI Powered Innovation
company.aspiration: Revolutionizing Businesses and Enabling a Better World Through Scalable, Ethical, and Impactful AI Solutions

founders.name: Dineshkumar Duraisamy
highlights: Senior Product Management roles @ Unisys, Cognizant
Experienced in engineering Transformative AI products

founders.name: Saravanakumar D
highlights: Enterprise architect roles in Robert Bosch, NEXT Techno Solutions

services.title: Context Engineering Services
services.description: Intelligence before code. We engineer the context layer — system constraints, domain knowledge, and task boundaries — so your agents think right before they act.

services.title: Agent Engineering & Development
services.description: Your core AI capability, engineered right. From single-agent pipelines to multi-agent orchestration — we design, build, and ship production-grade agents that actually work in the real world.

services.title: Agent Security
services.description: Most companies treat agent security as an afterthought. We make it a dedicated lifecycle stage — because one prompt injection can undo months of engineering.

services.title: Agentic AI Assurance Services
services.description: Ship with confidence, not crossed fingers. We validate your agents for reliability, fairness, and trust — because an unverified agent is a liability, not an asset.

clients.name: TimeSmart.AI
clients.description: Managed the development of entire backend for the TimeSmart.ai SaaS platform. Built with proper Microservices architecture and design paradigms, leveraging Java Spring Boot and MongoDB Technologies.

clients.name: SMOOR
clients.subtitle: True Couverture Chocolates
clients.description: Managed the development and maintenance of the ERP Platform covering their end to end backend supply chain from procurement to manufacturing to Sales and Delivery. Built on top of open source ERPNext Platform.

clients.name: CAPSmart
clients.description: Managed the development of entire backend for the CAPSmart SaaS platform. Built with proper Microservices architecture and design paradigms, leveraging Java Spring Boot and MongoDB Technologies.

clients.name: IBA
clients.subtitle: Ibacart
clients.description: Setting up the eCommerce platform for Ibacart using the Shopify engine. Custom development of key policies as per their business needs. Integration with 3rd party logistics and payment providers.

caseStudies.title: Q&A Chatbot for Contract Management Portal
caseStudies.description: Multi-agent system for intelligent contract querying using Vector RAG and Graph RAG.

agents.name: Contract Query Agent
agents.role: Handles Semantic Query over a particular contract

agents.name: Contract Manager Query Agent
agents.role: Handles Multi-hop or Multi-entity related complex queries

caseStudies.title: Automated Contract Creation
caseStudies.description: AI-powered contract creation pipeline with extraction and validation using ReAct-based agents.

agents.name: Extraction Agent
agents.role: ReAct-based agent for extracting contract terms, services, and compensation

agents.name: Critique Agent
agents.role: Validates extracted data with structural, completeness, and correctness checks
